summary: UI redesign testing for Jobs Feed (/jobs) and Discover Companies (/discover) pages. All 17 features tested and verified. Header nav 'Canopy' successfully renamed to 'The Headhunt' linking to /jobs. Both pages now have Header, Footer, light theme (bg-slate-50), and match Courses page design.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.js: 'Canopy' correctly replaced with 'The Headhunt' at lines 133-137 (desktop nav), 248-254 (dropdown), 393-399 (mobile nav)
JobsFeed.js: Properly imports and uses Header/Footer components, light theme bg-slate-50 applied
DiscoverCompanies.js: Properly imports and uses Header/Footer components, light theme bg-slate-50 applied
Both pages use proper data-testid attributes for testing
Filter tabs and search functionality working correctly
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data - 5 companies, 6 posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign complete. Jobs Feed and Discover Companies pages now have Header/Footer and light theme matching Courses page. Header nav shows 'The Headhunt' instead of 'Canopy' and links to /jobs.
